paper.title: Review Patch Planner for Paper Revision Loops

claims.text: The planner converts 34 of 40 reviewer comments into patch-sized revision tasks.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The unsupported-request filter rejects 9 of 10 off-scope review comments.
claims.rationale: The claim has overlapping evidence in the paper.

claims.text: The paper suggests the planner may reduce author revision time, but no timed author study has been run.
claims.rationale: The claim is prospective, missing a direct run, or tied to an explicit limitation.

evidence.text: The revision table reports 34 patch-sized tasks from 40 reviewer comments.
The filter audit reports 9 rejected off-scope review comments out of 10 unsupported requests.
The discussion says no timed author study has been run.

limitations.text: The discussion says no timed author study has been run.
The paper suggests the planner may reduce author revision time, but no timed author study has been run.
